2026-04-13T20:37:31.1393825Z description: |
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1396185Z   Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1435806Z   Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1437589Z   predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1439268Z   analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1441007Z   Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1442104Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1442406Z on:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1443067Z   issues:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1443769Z     types: [opened]
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1444583Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1445694Z     inputs:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1446401Z       issue_number:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1447764Z         description: "Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)"
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1449321Z         required: true
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1450142Z         type: string
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1450903Z   roles: all
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1451615Z   reaction: eyes
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1452048Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1452380Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1452868Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1453167Z network:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1453828Z   allowed:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1454485Z     - defaults
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1455405Z     - "api.nuget.org"
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1455888Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1456186Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1456974Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1457885Z   add-labels:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1458564Z     max: 7
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1459228Z     target: "*"
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1459939Z   remove-labels:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1486113Z     max: 7
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1486819Z     target: "*"
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1487530Z   add-comment:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1488230Z     max: 2
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1488919Z     target: "*"
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1489648Z   assign-to-user:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1490377Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1491044Z     target: "*"
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1491809Z   close-issue:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1492523Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1493181Z     target: "*"
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1493886Z   noop:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1494608Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1506225Z   jobs:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1507054Z     mention_owners:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1509175Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1511409Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1512382Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1513437Z       permissions:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1514199Z         issues: write
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1533522Z       inputs:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1534328Z         message:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1535867Z           description: "The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols"
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1537364Z           required: true
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1538194Z           type: string
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1538974Z         owners:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1540772Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1543027Z           required: true
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1543868Z           type: string
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1544647Z       steps:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1564524Z         - name: Post mention comment
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1565874Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1566869Z           env:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1568024Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1569454Z           with:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1570189Z             script: |
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1571010Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1572209Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1573115Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1573503Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1575601Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1577231Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1578259Z                 }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1579399Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1580973Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1582164Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1583041Z                 }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1583975Z                 return null;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1585076Z               }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1585520Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1585988Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1587188Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1588330Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1589065Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1589422Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1592590Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1595828Z                 return;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1596606Z               }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1597039Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1597426Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1598647Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1599811Z                 try {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1600711Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1601943Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1603129Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1604188Z                   });
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1605308Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1606593Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1608973Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1610925Z                   });
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1611773Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1613105Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1614430Z                 }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1615387Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1616350Z               }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1616790Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1617124Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1618239Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1619400Z                 return;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1620166Z               }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1620987Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1622361Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1623680Z                 return;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1624441Z               }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1625013Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1625361Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1626439Z               try {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1627558Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1629037Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1630419Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1631984Z                 return;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1632753Z               }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1633172Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1633731Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1635330Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1636528Z                 return;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1637302Z               }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1637724Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1638517Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1640016Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1641296Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1642577Z                 return;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1643349Z               }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1643775Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1644123Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1645722Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1647492Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1648802Z                   return;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1649587Z                 }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1650019Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1650383Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1651405Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1652347Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1653309Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1654221Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1655435Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1656727Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1658230Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1659645Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1661865Z                   })
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1664377Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1666169Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1666574Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1668032Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1669365Z                   return;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1670169Z                 }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1670596Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1670957Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1672147Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1673355Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1674029Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1674329Z                 try {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1675428Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1676711Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1677807Z                     body
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1678599Z                   });
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1680034Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1681716Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1683120Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1702088Z                   return;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1702918Z                 }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1703675Z               }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1704103Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1704407Z tools:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1705391Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1706101Z   github:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1706793Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1708052Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1709570Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1711118Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1712347Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1712867Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1713199Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1713950Z ---

2026-04-13T20:37:31.1780106Z           with:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1780800Z             script: |
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1781593Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1782732Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1783601Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1783991Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1785659Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1787207Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1788187Z                 }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1789289Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1790777Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1791942Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1792791Z                 }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1793502Z                 return null;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1794336Z               }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1794902Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1795346Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1796502Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1797598Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1798292Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1798645Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1801682Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1804597Z                 return;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1805499Z               }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1805920Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1806301Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1807520Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1808631Z                 try {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1809516Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1810693Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1811851Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1812878Z                   });
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1816724Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1818049Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1820301Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1822262Z                   });
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1823095Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1824382Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1825883Z                 }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1826655Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1827583Z               }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1828002Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1828320Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1829373Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1830499Z                 return;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1831263Z               }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1832028Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1833344Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1834603Z                 return;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1835495Z               }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1835917Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1836238Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1837068Z               try {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1838308Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1839687Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1841178Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1842561Z                 return;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1843311Z               }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1843708Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1844348Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1845918Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1847087Z                 return;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1847828Z               }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1848232Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1848991Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1850440Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1851664Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1852902Z                 return;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1853634Z               }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1854038Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1854369Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1855951Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1857681Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1858924Z                   return;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1859686Z                 }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1860099Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1860455Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1861454Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1862347Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1863271Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1864159Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1865316Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1866570Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1867983Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1869371Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1870322Z                   })
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1871086Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1871686Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1872044Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1873322Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1874583Z                   return;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1875522Z                 }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1875947Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1876284Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1877395Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1878542Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1879175Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1879466Z                 try {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1880396Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1881594Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1882660Z                     body
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1883453Z                   });
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1885007Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1886652Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1888015Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1889434Z                   return;
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1890201Z                 }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1890904Z               }
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1891322Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1891600Z tools:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1892286Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1892960Z   github:
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1893638Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1894683Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1896408Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1897844Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1899121Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1899633Z 
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1899951Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1901090Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1902476Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (6762 chars):
2026-04-13T20:37:31.1989503Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues\n  Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,\n  predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides\n  analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links\n  Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository\n\non:\n  issues:\n    types: [opened]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      issue_number:\n        description: \"Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)\"\n        required: true\n        type: string\n  roles: all\n  reaction: eyes\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork:\n  allowed:\n    - defaults\n    - \"api.nuget.org\"\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  add-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  remove-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  add-comment:\n    max: 2\n    target: \"*\"\n  assign-to-user:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  close-issue:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    mention_owners:\n      description: \"Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      output: \"Owner mention comment posted\"\n      permissions:\n        issues: write\n      inputs:\n        message:\n          description: \"The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n        owners:\n          description: \"Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n      steps:\n        - name: Post mention comment\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const fs = require('fs');\n              const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;\n\n              function resolveIssueNumber() {\n                if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {\n                  return context.issue.number;\n                }\n                const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);\n                if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {\n                  return parsed;\n                }\n                return null;\n              }\n\n              const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();\n              const owner = context.repo.owner;\n              const repo = context.repo.repo;\n\n              if (issueNumber === null) {\n                core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              async function failSafe(reason) {\n                core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.addLabels({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    labels: ['needs-team-triage']\n                  });\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'\n                  });\n                } catch (recoveryError) {\n                  core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);\n                }\n                core.setFailed(reason);\n              }\n\n              if (!outputFile) {\n                await failSafe('No agent output path provided');\n                return;\n              }\n              if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {\n                await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              let agentOutput;\n              try {\n                agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));\n              } catch (parseError) {\n                await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {\n                await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');\n              if (items.length === 0) {\n                await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              for (const item of items) {\n                if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {\n                  await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const mentions = item.owners\n                  .split(/[\\s,]+/)\n                  .map(s => s.trim())\n                  .filter(Boolean)\n                  .map(raw => {\n                    const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\\\?@/, '');\n                    if (/\\r|\\n/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    return `@${normalized}`;\n                  })\n                  .filter(Boolean);\n\n                if (mentions.length === 0) {\n                  await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const body = item.message\n                  ? `${item.message}\\n\\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`\n                  : mentions.join(' ');\n\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body\n                  });\n                  core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);\n                } catch (apiError) {\n                  await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);\n                  return;\n                }\n              }\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues]\n    # Triage must read issues from all users, including external\n    # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the\n    # auto-applied \"approved\" policy filters them out via DIFC\n    min-integrity: none\n\ntimeout-minutes: 10"}
